text:
The Serious VS The Insane (本気ＶＳ狂気, Honki vs. Kyōki) is a character song from the 2011 Hunter × Hunter anime adaptation, performed by Daisuke Namikawa as Hisoka Morow and Megumi Han as Gon Freecss. The song was released on 08/22/2012 on the album Character Song Collection: Heavens Arena.
